review_text: The monument is breathtaking and absolutely worth visiting, but the entry queue was very long and the crowd was difficult to manage.

review_text: Beautiful historic fort with amazing architecture. The visit was smooth and well managed.

review_text: Stunning ancient ruins and peaceful atmosphere. No major complaint from my side.
The temple carvings are magnificent, but it was extremely hot and there was almost no shade or seating area.
image_description: Visitors standing in open sun with no visible shaded seating.

review_text: Wonderful heritage experience, but ticketing was slow and staff at the counter were unhelpful.

review_text: The site is historically important and the museum section was informative.

review_text: Amazing place and architecture, but the image clearly shows litter near the walking path.

review_text: Iconic UNESCO heritage site. The guide explained the history well and the premises were clean.
